'''lagate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:palaeomagnetically|palaeomagnetically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:palaeomagnetically|palaeomagnetically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lagate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:lagate|lagate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lagatesher|lagatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagatesherĂ«m|lagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lagatero|lagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lagateshĂ«|lagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagateshĂ«m|lagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilagatero|gokilagatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilagateshĂ«|gokilagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagateshĂ«m|gokilagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golagankerom|golagankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golagankeshĂ«|golagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golagankeshĂ«m|golagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golagankeya|golagankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lagaterom|lagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagatemu|lagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lagateya|lagateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilagaterom|gokilagaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagatemu|gokilagatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilagateya|gokilagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lagagate|lagagate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lagagatesher|lagagatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagagatesherĂ«m|lagagatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lagagatero|lagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lagagateshĂ«|lagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagagateshĂ«m|lagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilagagatero|gokilagagatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilagagateshĂ«|gokilagagateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagagateshĂ«m|gokilagagateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golagagankerom|golagagankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golagagankeshĂ«|golagagankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golagagankeshĂ«m|golagagankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golagagankeya|golagagankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lagagaterom|lagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lagagatemu|lagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lagagateya|lagagateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilagagaterom|gokilagagaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilagagatemu|gokilagagatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilagagateya|gokilagagateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠgĂŠte|lĂŠgĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠgĂŠtesher|lĂŠgĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠgĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠgĂŠtero|lĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠgĂŠtero|gokilĂŠgĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠgĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠgĂŠnkerom|golĂŠgĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠgĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠgĂŠnkeya|golĂŠgĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠgĂŠterom|lĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠgĂŠtemu|lĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠgĂŠteya|lĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠgĂŠterom|gokilĂŠgĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠgĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠgĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠgĂŠteya|gokilĂŠgĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafgafte|lafgafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafgaftesher|lafgaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafgaftesherĂ«m|lafgaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafgaftero|lafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafgafteshĂ«|lafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafgafteshĂ«m|lafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafgaftero|gokilafgaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafgafteshĂ«|gokilafgafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafgafteshĂ«m|gokilafgafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafgafnkerom|golafgafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafgafnkeshĂ«|golafgafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafgafnkeshĂ«m|golafgafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafgafnkeya|golafgafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafgafterom|lafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafgaftemu|lafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafgafteya|lafgafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafgafterom|gokilafgafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafgaftemu|gokilafgaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafgafteya|gokilafgafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
